meta.description: Late WotLK (≈3.3.5 / July 2010) World of Warcraft API reference (wowprogramming.com archive). Not Cataclysm launch / not retail-modern WoW.
meta.lookup: Use by_name[<FunctionName>][0].path and .anchor to open the markdown file and jump to the ## heading. Events: events[<NAME>].path.
